speaker: CHORUS
text: Thus with imagined wing our swift scene flies

speaker: CHORUS
text: In motion of no less celerity

speaker: CHORUS
text: Than that of thought. Suppose that you have seen

speaker: CHORUS
text: The well-appointed king at Dover pier

speaker: CHORUS
text: Embark his royalty, and his brave fleet

speaker: CHORUS
text: With silken streamers the young Phoebus fanning.

speaker: CHORUS
text: Play with your fancies and in them behold,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Upon the hempen tackle, shipboys climbing.

speaker: CHORUS
text: Hear the shrill whistle, which doth order give

speaker: CHORUS
text: To sounds confused. Behold the threaden sails,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Borne with th’ invisible and creeping wind,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Draw the huge bottoms through the furrowed sea,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Breasting the lofty surge. O, do but think

speaker: CHORUS
text: You stand upon the rivage and behold

speaker: CHORUS
text: A city on th’ inconstant billows dancing,

speaker: CHORUS
text: For so appears this fleet majestical,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Holding due course to Harfleur. Follow, follow!

speaker: CHORUS
text: Grapple your minds to sternage of this navy,

speaker: CHORUS
text: And leave your England, as dead midnight still,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Guarded with grandsires, babies, and old women,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Either past or not arrived to pith and puissance,

speaker: CHORUS
text: For who is he whose chin is but enriched

speaker: CHORUS
text: With one appearing hair that will not follow

speaker: CHORUS
text: These culled and choice-drawn cavaliers to France?

speaker: CHORUS
text: Work, work your thoughts, and therein see a siege;

speaker: CHORUS
text: Behold the ordnance on their carriages,

speaker: CHORUS
text: With fatal mouths gaping on girded Harfleur.

speaker: CHORUS
text: Suppose th’ Ambassador from the French comes back,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Tells Harry that the King doth offer him

speaker: CHORUS
text: Katherine his daughter and with her, to dowry,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Some petty and unprofitable dukedoms.

speaker: CHORUS
text: The offer likes not, and the nimble gunner

speaker: CHORUS
text: With linstock now the devilish cannon touches,

speaker: CHORUS
text: And down goes all before them. Still be kind,

speaker: CHORUS
text: And eke out our performance with your mind.
